home.title: Wellness Tourism in Egypt
home.subtitle: Discover your healing journey in the heart of nature
home.tagline: Waha helps you find your natural healing destination in Egypt — Safaga (psoriasis & rheumatism), Siwa (sulfuric springs), Sinai (mountains & asthma), Fayoum, and the Western Oases. Transparent pricing, easy WhatsApp booking.
home.recommendedFor: Your recommended destination based on your answers
home.infoCardsSubtitle: Egypt holds rare natural resources that make it one of the world's best wellness destinations

footer.tagline: Egypt's specialised wellness-tourism platform. We help you find the natural destination that fits your health and wellbeing.
footer.rights: © 2026 Waha · Eco-tourism & Natural Healing in Egypt
